metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\fs24{\fs48\b MC Scripts\b}\line\line Unified ReaPack repository for REAPER scripts developed by MC Scripts.\line\line Import this ReaPack repository:\line\line \i\ul text https://github.com/Echo722/MC-Scripts/raw/main/index.xml \ul0\i0 \line\line Scripts install under:\line\line \i\ul text REAPER/Scripts/MC Scripts Release/<script-folder>/ \ul0\i0 \line\line {\fs24\b Packages\b}\line\line {\par \bullet\tab MCAssistant: in-REAPER AI chat assistant with streaming and batch-operation tools.\line \bullet\tab MediaEye: Media Explorer album art viewer for embedded and sidecar cover images.\line }\line {\fs24\b Release Convention\b}\line\line Packages in this repository use:\line\line {\par \bullet\tab Author: \i\ul MC Scripts\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Repository name: \i\ul MC Scripts Release\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Category: \i\ul <script-folder>\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Source file paths: direct package files such as \i\ul MediaEye.lua\ul0\i0 or \i\ul MCAssistant.lua\ul0\i0 \line }\line }

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Move installed files under MC Scripts Release/MCAssistant so ReaPack installs into the MC Scripts Release folder.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Rename provider type 'claude' to 'anthropic' so both providers use vendor names (anthropic / openai). 'claude' is kept as a silent alias so existing 0.5.1 configs still load.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Settings overlay with visual web search toggle. Click gear icon to open Settings panel with toggle pill for web search, API key management, and provider config. Replaces text-field toggle (1/0) with click-to-toggle UI. Bug fix: local ui declaration order for callback closures. pcall protection for overlay rendering.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Move the ReaPack install path to MC Scripts Release/MediaEye so MC Scripts releases are grouped together.
